theme_archetype.vibe: Bloomberg Terminal, Professional, Sharp, Data-Driven, Rigid

rules.headings: Instrument Sans, font-bold, tracking-tight. NO INTER FOR HEADINGS.
rules.data_and_numbers: JetBrains Mono. Use for all scores, metrics, code snippets, timestamps, and tabular data.
rules.labels: JetBrains Mono, uppercase, tracking-[0.1em], text-xs text-secondary.

spacing_and_layout.philosophy: Generous whitespace between sections. Dense and compact within data cards.
spacing_and_layout.edges: Sharp corners ONLY. Use rounded-none globally, or strictly rounded-sm (2px) for inputs/buttons if absolutely necessary. NO bubbly rounded-lg or rounded-xl.
spacing_and_layout.borders: Expose the skeleton. Heavy use of 1px solid borders (#1e293b) to separate sections rather than relying on background changes.

surface_strategies.cards: Flat solid background (#111827). 1px border (#1e293b). NO gradients. NO soft shadows. If elevation is needed, use a hard offset shadow (e.g., 4px 4px 0px #000).
surface_strategies.claim_cards: Must use a thick colored left border (border-l-4) to indicate status. Background remains #111827.
surface_strategies.inputs: Flat, sharp edges, 1px border. Focus state must have a sharp 2px ring.
surface_strategies.badges: Minimalist. 1px border matching the status color, transparent background, text matching status color. No filled pills.

navigation.style: Minimalist top bar. Solid #0a0f1a bg, 1px bottom border #1e293b.
navigation.logo: Text only. JetBrains Mono, uppercase, e.g., '[TRUST_LAYER]', font-bold tracking-widest.

data_connection.layout: Grid or clean list. Tabs for switching input methods (CSV, Paste, GSheets, DB).
data_connection.dropzone: border-2 border-dashed border-[#1e293b] hover:border-[#94a3b8] transition-colors p-12 text-center. Font: Instrument Sans with monospace accents.
data_connection.preview_table: Dense, Bloomberg-style table. JetBrains Mono text. 1px borders on all cells. No rounded corners.

analysis_input.textarea: Massive text area (min-h-[400px]). bg-[#111827], border-[#1e293b], focus:ring-1 focus:ring-white. Padding p-8. Font: Instrument Sans.

validation_loader.style: Terminal-style output. JetBrains Mono. Staggered reveal of text. E.g., '> Decomposing into atomic claims... [DONE]'. Use a thin, sharp progress bar.

results_dashboard.score_ring: Visual centerpiece. Massive SVG circle in the center. Stroke width thin but distinct. Color strictly maps to score (Green/Yellow/Red). Center text must be JetBrains Mono, e.g., '78%'.
results_dashboard.stat_pills: Grid layout (cols-2 md:cols-5). Each pill shows large mono number + tiny uppercase label + status color dot.

claim_card.closed_state: bg-[#111827], border border-[#1e293b] border-l-4 (status color). p-4 flex items-center justify-between cursor-pointer hover:bg-[#1f2937].
claim_card.expanded_state: Reveals 'Claimed vs Actual', deep explanation, and standard Shadcn code block for pandas verification code.
claim_card.typography: Claim text in Instrument Sans text-lg. Metadata in JetBrains Mono text-xs.

results_dashboard.filter_tabs: Sharp square buttons. Active state: bg-white text-black. Inactive state: text-secondary hover:text-white.
results_dashboard.analysis_sections: Sections for 'What's Missing', 'Hidden Assumptions' use clean typography, bullet points, maybe mono-font indices (01, 02, 03) on the left.

motion_and_interaction.philosophy: Functional, not decorative. Snap transitions or very fast eases. No bouncy springs.
motion_and_interaction.score_ring: Animate the SVG stroke-dashoffset from 0 to target score over 1.5 seconds. Use ease-out.
motion_and_interaction.accordion_expand: Fast height transition (0.2s) for claim cards.

media.icon_strategy: Use Lucide-react sparingly. Rely mostly on colored status dots (w-2 h-2 rounded-full) or pure text (+, -, x, !). If icons are used, stroke-width must be 1.5 for a sharp technical look.

data_testid_requirements.global: All interactive elements must have data-testid. Format: kebab-case, role-based.

instructions_to_main_agent.1: DO NOT install or use external image libraries. The UI is purely typography and data-driven.
instructions_to_main_agent.2: Setup Tailwind with the exact hex codes provided in 'colors'.
instructions_to_main_agent.3: Configure Tailwind config to remove border-radius globally if possible, or strictly use rounded-none in classes.
instructions_to_main_agent.5: Install 'framer-motion' for the validation loader and score ring animations.
instructions_to_main_agent.6: Install fonts: Instrument Sans and JetBrains Mono (via Google Fonts in index.html/CSS).
instructions_to_main_agent.7: Use Shadcn components but STRIP AWAY all rounded corners (rounded-md/lg -> rounded-none).
instructions_to_main_agent.8: Implement the 'Demo Mode' exactly as requested: 16 claims (7 wrong, 4 verified, 3 partial, 2 logic gaps) bypassing the API requirement.
instructions_to_main_agent.9: Ensure the layout breathes. Use py-24 between major dashboard sections (e.g., between the Score Ring section and the Claims section).
